state.title: Find auth queue rationale

parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so same-tenant duplicate refreshes coalesce while different tenants can refresh in parallel. A single global mutex would incorrectly make unrelated tenants block each other.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e1a48508ffeqzRGlU9bxkrqoZ","blob_id":"auth_refresh_queue","message_id":"msg_e1e5b7b06001H4ERalyg5Ftyi2"},"rationale":"The cited message supports the full rationale and notes the rejected alternative: a global mutex was considered but rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel requires unrelated tenants not to block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing retry queue rationale","Markdown parser onboarding cleanup"]}
